name: issue-359-fan-state-machine
description: Fan ON then OFF โ nat-vent adoption, comfort-floor exit, setpoint echo suppression (Issue #359)
notes: Occupant outcome: User woke up (2026-06-28 ~07:39) to a 71ยฐF home with outdoor 57ยฐF.
Fan turned on (manually or by thermostat program). CA should adopt it as nat-vent free cooling.
Around 08:11 indoor reached the comfort floor โ CA exits nat-vent, fan stops.
This scenario validates the full nat-vent session lifecycle: activation โ comfort-floor exit.
The setpoint echo suppression (Fix A) and direction-aware dispatch (Fix B/C) are coordinator-level
and not exercisable in the Tier-A headless harness (requires _async_thermostat_changed event loop).
Those paths are covered by test_fan_cancel.py unit tests.
(a) Scenario effectiveness: if _natural_vent_active is never set on sensor_open with eligible
conditions, the second assertion (nat_vent_comfort_floor_exit) would not fire.
The first assertion (natural_ventilation) would also fail โ both fail without the feature.
(b) Docsโproduction alignment: docs/08-COMPUTATION-REFERENCE.md ยง3 nat-vent section
documents comfort-floor exit. This scenario exercises that exact path.
(c) Occupant experience: without nat-vent activation CA would run AC on a cool morning,
wasting energy and potentially overcooling. With correct adoption the occupant gets
free cooling until the comfort floor (70ยฐF) is reached โ zero energy cost.

events.note: Morning: indoor=71ยฐF (above comfort_heat=70ยฐF), outdoor=57ยฐF. outdoor < indoor by 14ยฐF โ well beyond hysteresis. outdoor=57ยฐF < threshold (75+3=78ยฐF). Nat-vent conditions met when window/sensor opens.
Mild morning classification: hvac_mode=off. Nat-vent eligible if sensor opens and conditions met.
Door/window opens. outdoor=57ยฐF < indoor=71ยฐF (directional OK); indoor=71ยฐF > comfort_heat=70ยฐF (floor OK); outdoor=57ยฐF < threshold=78ยฐF. Nat-vent activates, fan turns on.
Indoor cooled to comfort_heat floor=70ยฐF. Nat-vent comfort-floor exit fires: session ends, fan deactivated, HVAC may resume per classification (hvac_mode=off means no HVAC restore).

assertions.reason: Sensor opened with outdoor=57ยฐF < indoor=71ยฐF (14ยฐF differential exceeds hysteresis); outdoor=57ยฐF < threshold=78ยฐF; indoor=71ยฐF > comfort_heat=70ยฐF. All three nat-vent conditions met โ engine activates nat-vent and turns on HVAC fan. Issue #359 validates this adoption path works after the on_fan_turned_off() refactor.

nat_vent_temperature_check called with indoor=70ยฐF = comfort_heat floor. Comfort-floor exit fires: _natural_vent_active cleared, fan deactivated, grace period started. Occupant: free cooling ran ~32 min bringing home from 71ยฐF to 70ยฐF at zero energy cost.

verdict.summary: Nat-vent activates on sensor open with eligible conditions, exits cleanly at comfort floor (Issue #359)
verdict.observed_behavior: sensor_open โ natural_ventilation (fan on) โ nat_vent_comfort_floor_exit at comfort floor
verdict.expected_behavior: CA adopts fan as nat-vent when outdoor is sufficiently cooler than indoor; exits when indoor reaches comfort floor โ occupant gets free cooling with no AC energy cost
